name: Default
description: The shipped, balance-asserted ruleset. Numbers come straight from the Monte Carlo (heat-model-simulation.py) and heist-game-design.md. The balance harness (npm run sim:check) holds this preset to the design targets; it must stay green.

units.heat: Heat points on the 0..hMax track, shown as face-down cards
units.fraction: a fraction of hMax (e.g. runAtFraction 0.55 * hMax 20 = Heat 11)
units.loot: abstract Loot units; score is derived from these

_note: Content packs listed above are authored in later epics (E2/E5/E7/E8/E9). Until they exist, this preset inherits nothing for them and content:validate will report them missing — expected before those epics land. tuning.json and scaling.json are complete now and drive the engine + sim harness.
